# Name

**Data field**

A string holding the track name.

## Overview

A `NULL`-terminated UTF-8 or UTF-16 string holding the track name. If this is a UTF-16 string, the string must start with a byte-order mark (`0xFEFF`).

## Data fields

- **Reserved**: A 32-bit integer.
- **Language**: A 16-bit integer holding a packed ISO 639-2/T code.

items.description: A 16-bit integer holding a packed ISO 639-2/T code.
